signals.title: Amazon Selects Missouri for $10 Billion Data Center Campus
signals.summary: The project is expected to create over 400 full-time data center jobs, thousands of construction jobs, and over $7 million in community contributions MONTGOMERY COUNTY, Mo., June 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Amazon today announced plans to invest $10 billion in Missouri to construct a new,...

signals.title: Nvidia plans to raise at least $20 billion in its first debt sale since start of AI boom
signals.summary: Nvidia is set to raise capital in a debt sale for the first time since 2021, when the chipmaker was a fraction of its current size.

signals.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
signals.summary: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

signals.title: France picks MBDA-Safran combo to supply multiple rocket launcher
signals.summary: Paris snubbed competing offers from Thales and ArianeGroup, as well as from U.S. defense giant Lockheed Martin and South Korea's Hanwha Aerospace.

signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery
signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.

signals.title: Trump trusts Fed Chair Kevin Warsh. It matters for more than interest rates
signals.summary: New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh is expected to hold interest rates steady this week, but President Donald Trump’s trust gives him room to pursue longer-term changes.

signals.title: Anthropic to meet with Trump administration over Mythos dispute
signals.summary: Anthropic received an export control directive that ordered the company to suspend access to its latest AI models by any foreign national.

signals.title: Gilat to buy Comtech satcoms business six years after failed merger
signals.summary:
Israel’s Gilat Satellite Networks plans to expand its defense capabilities by acquiring most of Comtech’s space-related communications business, six years after the U.S. company’s own takeover bid collapsed. 
 The post  Gilat to buy Comtech satcoms business six years after failed merger  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
signals.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

signals.title: Coinbase's Brian Armstrong says bitcoin may have bottomed at $60,000

signals.summary:
NASA has provided more details about the revised approaches that Blue Origin and SpaceX are taking to accelerate work on Artemis lunar landers.

signals.title: Utility sector outlook deteriorates on affordability concerns: Fitch
signals.summary: Utilities are expected to make $240 billion in capital expenditures this year, but political and regulatory pressure could put timely cost recovery at risk, the ratings agency said.

signals.title: Distributed solar’s overlooked role: Keeping farmland out of the real estate market
signals.summary: If we want farmland to stay farmland, we have to be open-minded about what farming looks like today, writes Abby Broedlin, vice president of asset management at Nautilus Solar Energy.

signals.title: Sen. Warren asks Trump if administration plans to raise Social Security retirement age
signals.summary: In a new letter to President Donald Trump, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., asks what the administration's plans are for Social Security reform.

signals.title: SpaceX stock jumps 20% in first full day of trading after record debut
signals.summary: SpaceX is valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trading last week.

signals.title: The Iran deal came just in time as Strategic Petroleum Reserve hits lowest level since 1983
signals.summary: Oil executives have warned that global inventories are rapidly depleting due to the supply disruption triggered by the Iran war.

signals.title: How the Strait of Hormuz reopening could unfold if the U.S.-Iran deal is implemented
signals.summary: Tanker traffic through Hormuz could quickly increase but it is unclear whether transits will approach prewar levels, according to Kpler.

signals.title: Centene to offer buyouts to some employees as health insurer cuts costs
signals.summary: The health insurer Centene did not indicate to how many employees were offered buyouts or how much it is aiming to reduce its workforce.

signals.title: Sustained maneuver has a propulsion problem
signals.summary:
For years, space architecture was treated mostly as a question of placement: where to put a spacecraft, and how reliably it could hold position. That framing is now too narrow. […]

signals.title: Russian strategic bomber crashes in Siberia during training exercise
signals.summary: The Soviet-era supersonic bomber has most recently been used by Russia for combat missions in Syria and Ukraine.

signals.title: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz
signals.summary: The memorandum of understanding is scheduled to be officially signed on Friday in Switzerland.

signals.title: Australia forges ahead with 155mm ammo production
signals.summary: The Maryborough factory will commence M795 production by late 2028 at a rate of 15,000 rounds annually.

signals.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares
signals.summary: The biggest IPO has been digested without a hiccup, and Wall Street's  so-called "fear gauge" is back below its long-term average.

signals.title: I want people to be millionaires — Jim Cramer's blueprint to make money in any market
signals.summary: In this exclusive interview, Jim walks through how investors should think about identifying a small group of individual stocks to complement a diversified portfolio

signals.title: Salesforce to buy AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to boost agentic offerings
signals.summary: Businesses are accelerating their agentic offerings for enterprises as competition heats up.

signals.title: 10-year Treasury yield slides as Iran deal drives rethink on Fed interest rate hikes
signals.summary: The 10-year Treasury yield fell on Monday following the announcement of a preliminary peace agreement between Washington and Tehran.

signals.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
signals.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.

signals.title: French army shows Leclerc tank with once-mocked anti-drone cage
signals.summary: Once derided as primitive, roof-mounted armor variants have been adopted by both Russian and Ukrainian forces as drone threats proliferate.

signals.title: France prepares Ukraine-inspired ‘kill web’ for battlefield awareness
signals.summary: The kill web will be part of the broader Arcadia AI-powered battlefield command and control structure, a top French commander said.

signals.title: Vance says 'a lot' of Iran deal details to figure out, but U.S. has 'all the cards'
signals.summary: Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran.

signals.title: Warsh's Fed is likely to hold rates steady — what the leadership change could mean for your money
signals.summary: The Federal Reserve's June meeting, the first helmed by new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, may impact many consumer borrowing and savings rates down the road.

signals.title: Oil tumbles on US-Iran deal framework: How one trader is playing the move
signals.summary: Airline stocks are rallying Monday and the U.S. Global Jets ETF (JETS) is on the verge of a new high for the year.

signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
signals.summary: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.

signals.title: Dick's Sporting Goods expanding Lids shops to 100 locations
signals.summary: Dick's Sporting Goods announced a partnership to bring Lids shops to 100 Dick's stores.

signals.title: Vance says U.S. expects Strait of Hormuz to be open 'toll free' long term
signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran have issued conflicting statements on how the Strait of Hormuz will be managed.

signals.title: Electronic Arts launches EA Advertising, a new way for brands to advertise 'directly into gameplay'
signals.summary: Electronic Arts announced EA Advertising, a new way for brands to connect with fans through its portfolio of games, from stadium signs to custom content.

signals.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
signals.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.

signals.title: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
signals.summary: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

signals.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
signals.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

signals.title: Interview: French Army chief Schill talks technology, surprise and ‘archaic’ combat
signals.summary: "We should avoid excessive analogies. France is not Ukraine," said Gen. Pierre Schill in an interview ahead of the Eurosatory defense expo near Paris.

signals.title: US strike kills leader of Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang, White House says
signals.summary: Venezuela’s information ministry said that during the operation there were clashes with members of criminal groups, in which the leader was neutralized.
